description: Evaluates business continuity management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, BCP processes and strategy, continuity planning, exercises, stakeholder communication, disaster response planning and exercises, cyber resilience and ransomware recovery, and equipment redundancy.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A business continuity management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise business continuity management service exists
Regular business continuity management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Business continuity KPIs and KRIs—including RTO/RPO attainment, exercise completion, and recovery test success—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service
Regular KPI/KRI review for the BCP service
RTO and RPO attainment metrics
Exercise completion and recovery test success rates

capabilities.name: BCP processes
capabilities.description: Business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures are formalized, documented, and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity and operational resilience policies and procedures
Regular review and update of policies and procedures

capabilities.name: BCP strategy
capabilities.description: The enterprise has strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions—including cyber and ransomware events—within risk appetite, with quarterly efficacy review.
evaluation_focus: Strategies to reduce impact, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite
Regular BCP strategy efficacy review
Cyber and ransomware disruption scenarios in strategy

capabilities.name: Business Continuity Planning
capabilities.description: A formalized business continuity plan is documented based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity plan based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities
Regular review cadence for the business continuity plan

capabilities.name: Business Continuity Exercises
capabilities.description: Business continuity and operational resilience plans are exercised at least annually or upon significant changes, reviewed quarterly, and automated where appropriate.
evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered exercise and testing of business continuity and operational resilience plans
Regular review of business continuity and operational resilience plans for efficacy
Automation of business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes

capabilities.name: Communication
capabilities.description: Stakeholder and participant communication plans support business continuity and resilience procedures and are reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Communication with stakeholders and participants during business continuity and resilience procedures
Regular communication plan efficacy review

capabilities.name: Disaster response plan and exercises
capabilities.description: A formalized disaster response plan supports recovery from natural and man-made disasters, is updated at least quarterly or upon significant changes, and is exercised annually including coordination with local emergency authorities where possible.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented disaster response plan for natural and man-made disasters
Regular or change-triggered update of the disaster response plan
Annual or change-triggered disaster response plan exercise including local emergency authorities where possible

capabilities.name: Cyber resilience and ransomware recovery
capabilities.description: Cyber resilience and ransomware recovery playbooks define backup validation, isolation, restoration, and communication steps and are exercised and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented cyber resilience and ransomware recovery playbooks
Backup validation and immutable recovery testing
Quarterly review and exercise of cyber recovery procedures

capabilities.name: Equipment Redundancy
capabilities.description: Business-critical equipment is supplemented with redundant equipment independently located at a reasonable minimum distance per applicable industry standards.
evaluation_focus: Redundant business-critical equipment independently located at reasonable minimum distance per industry standards

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
